description: Fix friend search bug (web users have no Firestore profile) and add username support for searching by username or email

userStories.title: Add username fields to UserProfile type
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the UserProfile type to include username and usernameLower fields so all packages can reference usernames.
acceptanceCriteria: UserProfile interface in packages/shared/src/types.ts includes 'username?: string' and 'usernameLower?: string'
Shared package builds successfully (yarn build)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Add username generation helper and usernames collection logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a helper function that derives a username from an email prefix, checks uniqueness against a Firestore 'usernames' collection, and appends numeric suffixes on collision.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a helper function (e.g., generateUniqueUsername) in services/api/src/lib/username.ts that takes an email and Firestore db instance
Function extracts the part before '@' as the base username
Function checks the 'usernames' Firestore collection (doc ID = lowercase username) for existence
If taken, appends incrementing numeric suffixes (name2, name3, ...) until a unique one is found
Function returns { username, usernameLower } where usernameLower is the lowercase version
Add unit tests for the helper in services/api/src/lib/username.test.ts covering: basic derivation, collision with suffix, case handling
Tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Generate username on POST /users profile creation
userStories.description: As a new user, I want a default username generated from my email prefix when my profile is created via POST /users.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /users in services/api/src/routes/users.ts calls the generateUniqueUsername helper to derive a username from the email
The created UserProfile document includes username and usernameLower fields
A reservation document is created in the 'usernames' collection (doc ID = lowercase username, value = { uid }) using a Firestore batch write atomically with the user profile
Response includes username in the returned profile JSON
Update existing POST /users tests and add new tests for username generation in services/api/src/routes/users.test.ts
Tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Generate username on PUT /users/me create path and lazy migration
userStories.description: As a user, I want a username auto-generated when my profile is created or updated via PUT /users/me, including lazy migration for existing users without usernames.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /users/me create path (when profile doesn't exist) generates a username using the same helper as POST /users
PUT /users/me update path: when the existing profile has no username field, auto-generate one (lazy migration for pre-existing users)
Both paths use batch writes to atomically create the user profile/update and the usernames reservation
Update existing PUT /users/me tests and add new tests for lazy username generation in services/api/src/routes/users.test.ts
Tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Add username update with validation to PUT /users/me
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change my username via PUT /users/me with format validation and uniqueness enforcement.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /users/me accepts a 'username' field in the request body for updating username
Username is validated: alphanumeric and underscores only, 3-30 characters — invalid usernames return 400 with descriptive error
Duplicate usernames return 409 with error 'Username already taken'
Old username reservation in the 'usernames' collection is released and new one is created atomically via batch write
usernameLower is updated to match the new username
Add tests for username update, validation errors (too short, invalid chars), and uniqueness conflicts
Tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Update search API to support username prefix search
userStories.description: As a user, I want GET /users/search to find users by username prefix in addition to email prefix.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /users/search?q=<query> runs two parallel Firestore queries: one on 'email' prefix (existing) and one on 'usernameLower' prefix (new)
Results are merged and deduplicated by uid
Response objects include 'username' field alongside uid, displayName, email
Current user is still excluded from results
Minimum query length of 2 characters is still enforced
Limit of 10 results is enforced across both queries combined
Add tests for searching by username prefix and deduplication
Existing search tests still pass
Tests pass (cd services/api && yarn test)
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)

userStories.title: Auto-create Firestore profile on web login
userStories.description: As a web user, I want my Firestore profile created automatically when I sign in so other users can find me in friend search.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/web/src/lib/auth-context.tsx, when onAuthStateChanged fires with an authenticated user, call PUT /users/me with { email, displayName } from the Firebase Auth user object
The call is idempotent — existing profiles are not overwritten, only missing profiles are created
Profile creation does not block page rendering (fire-and-forget with console.error on failure)
Use the existing apiPut helper from apps/web/src/lib/api.ts for the call
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update friend search UI to show usernames
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see @username in friend search results and friend list entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Search input placeholder in apps/web/src/app/friends/page.tsx updated to 'Search by username or email'
Search result items show @username in smaller muted text below or next to the display name
Friend list entries show @username alongside the display name
The UserSearchResult type/interface includes username field
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add settings page with username editing
userStories.description: As a user, I want a /settings page where I can see my profile info and change my username.
acceptanceCriteria: New page at apps/web/src/app/settings/page.tsx
Page displays current display name (read-only), email (read-only), and username (editable input)
Username input shows validation feedback: format rules (alphanumeric + underscores, 3-30 chars) and error messages from API (400/409)
Save button calls PUT /users/me with the new username and shows success or error feedback
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add settings link to NavBar
userStories.description: As a user, I want a link to /settings in the navigation bar so I can easily access my profile settings.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar component (find it in apps/web/src/components/NavBar.tsx or similar) includes a link to /settings — either a gear icon or 'Settings' text link
Link follows existing NavBar styling conventions
Typecheck passes (yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
